text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Food > Food Pantries * African American Community 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter African American Community AIDS/HIV At Risk Youth Hispanic/Latino Community Homeless Families Homeless Youth Mental Health Issues Seasonal Workers Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF FEED'EM FREEDOM FOUNDATION THE CENTER IN PARKROSE FOOD PANTRY PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a weekly food pantry with fresh produce from local BIPOC farmers, pantry staples, meat, and culturally specific foods. 4450 NE 131st Place Portland, OR 97230 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Wednesday/Friday 2pm-4:30pm, Thursday 3pm-6pm Email (503) 206-8746 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FEED'EM FREEDOM FOUNDATION FOOD PANTRY PROGRAM
